font-semibold text-text-primary mb-2">Frequently Asked Questions</h2><div class="w-full" data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_25pb5d4bdb9l5lb6_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_5pb5d4bdb9l5lb6_" class="w-full flex items-center justify-between py-5 lg:py-6 text-[14px] text-text-primary hover:text-text-secondary transition-colors group cursor-pointer text-start" data-radix-collection-item="">What is the &quot;Bitcoin Up or Down - April 26, 8:35PM-8:40PM ET&quot; prediction market?<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="shrink-0 ml-4 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_25pb5d4bdb9l5lb6_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_5pb5d4bdb9l5lb6_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"><div class="pb-5 lg:pb-6 text-[14px] text-text-primary leading-relaxed">&quot;Bitcoin Up or Down - April 26, 8:35PM-8:40PM ET&quot; is a 5-minute prediction market on Polymarket where traders buy and sell shares on whether Bitcoin&#x27;s price will finish higher (&quot;Up&quot;) or lower (&quot;Down&quot;) than its opening price over the 5-minute window specified in the title. The current market probability is 62% for &quot;Up.&quot; A price of 62% means the market collectively assigns a 62% chance to that outcome. Prices update in real-time as traders react to live Bitcoin price movements.
